pageContext.name: Jean Grey: Phoenix Transformation
pageContext.description: I'm always Jean. And I'm always the Phoenix.   Sideshow presents the Jean Grey Phoenix Transformation Fine Art Print, an intense Marvel art print by Kael Ngu.  Two beings, eternally linked, fight for dominance in the Jean Grey Phoenix Transformation Fine Art Print. In the foreground the Phoenix wears a shimmering suit of green and gold. Her red hair sweeps upwards with a blaze of yellow and orange flames, revealing Jean Grey's shadowy silhouette in the background. Clad in her '90s X-Men suit, Jean has lost control, trapped in her own mind as she relinquishes her body to the fires of rebirth.  Each Jean Grey Phoenix Transformation Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Sideshow logo as part of the limited edition of 300 pieces. Inspired by the dynamic Phoenix and Jean Grey Maquette by Sideshow, sold separately, this X-Men art is available as an unframed giclée and in a custom framed presentation to allow for different display options alongside the statue.  Embrace your power when you bring home the Jean Grey Phoenix Transformation Fine Art Print by Kael Ngu today!
